## deduped_findings

```yaml
- id: VULN-003
  category_id: GO_RUNTIME
  severity: HIGH
  title: "reflect.DeepEqual 用于密码学MAC验证存在时序攻击风险"
  file: "internal/sbi/processor/generate_auth_data.go"
  line: 323
  function: "GenerateAuthDataProcedure"
  snippet: "if reflect.DeepEqual(macS, Auts[6:]) {"
  description: "在5G AKA认证重同步流程中，使用reflect.DeepEqual比较MAC-S值，而非恒定时间比较函数。攻击者可通过测量比较时间推断MAC值差异，实现时序攻击，绕过MAC验证。"
  recommendation: "替换为 hmac.Equal(macS, Auts[6:]) 进行恒定时间比较"
  suspected_sources: ["authInfoRequest.ResynchronizationInfo.Auts"]
  sink_type: "reflect.DeepEqual"
  status: CONFIRMED_VULN
```

```yaml
sink_candidates:
  # FILE_OPS candidates
  - id: FILE_OPS-001
    category_id: FILE_OPS
    file: "pkg/factory/factory.go"
    function: "InitConfigFactory"
    sink: "os.ReadFile"
    line: 25
    sink_snippet: "if content, err := os.ReadFile(f); err != nil"
    suspected_sources:
      - "cliCtx.String(config)"
    taint_hints:
      - "配置路径来自CLI参数，属可信启动上下文"
    confidence: low

  - id: FILE_OPS-002
    category_id: FILE_OPS
    file: "cmd/main.go"
    function: "initLogFile"
    sink: "os.MkdirAll"
    line: 97
    sink_snippet: "if err := os.MkdirAll(tmpDir, 0o775); err != nil"
    suspected_sources:
      - "logNfPath CLI参数"
    taint_hints:
      - "路径派生自日志路径，权限0775合理"
    confidence: low

  # GO_RUNTIME candidates
  - id: GO_RUNTIME-001
    category_id: GO_RUNTIME
    file: "internal/sbi/processor/generate_auth_data.go"
    function: "GenerateAuthDataProcedure"
    sink: "reflect.DeepEqual"
    line: 323
    sink_snippet: "if reflect.DeepEqual(macS, Auts[6:]) {"
    suspected_sources:
      - "authInfoRequest.ResynchronizationInfo.Auts"
      - "UDR QueryAuthSubsData -> K/OPC"
    taint_hints:
      - "MAC-S 验证使用非恒定时间比较"
      - "攻击者可测量比较时间推断MAC差异"
    confidence: high
    vulnerability_type: "timing_attack"

  - id: GO_RUNTIME-002
    category_id: GO_RUNTIME
    file: "cmd/main.go"
    function: "main"
    sink: "panic/recover"
    line: 22
    sink_snippet: "if p := recover(); p != nil { logger.MainLog.Fatalf..."
    suspected_sources:
      - "任意panic触发点"
    taint_hints:
      - "recover后Fatalf退出进程"
      - "可能导致服务DoS"
    confidence: medium

  - id: GO_RUNTIME-003
    category_id: GO_RUNTIME
    file: "internal/sbi/server.go"
    function: "startServer"
    sink: "panic/recover"
    line: 78
    sink_snippet: "if p := recover(); p != nil { logger.SBILog.Fatalf..."
    suspected_sources:
      - "HTTP服务器异常"
    taint_hints:
      - "recover后调用Terminate"
      - "可能导致SBI服务终止"
    confidence: medium

  - id: GO_RUNTIME-004
    category_id: GO_RUNTIME
    file: "pkg/service/init.go"
    function: "listenShutdownEvent"
    sink: "panic/recover"
    line: 164
    sink_snippet: "if p := recover(); p != nil { logger.MainLog.Fatalf..."
    suspected_sources:
      - "goroutine内部panic"
    taint_hints:
      - "recover后Fatalf退出"
    confidence: medium
```
